posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s what’s new in our changelog from the past two weeks.

Apps
New monday code runtimes
New Google Analytics integration for marketplace apps

API
Upgrading GraphQL query validation to be more compliant
New app_subscriptions object
New updates fields
